name: Acute Bronchitis / Bronchiolitis Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for acute bronchitis and bronchiolitis. Used in the avoidance of antibiotic treatment for acute bronchitis/bronchiolitis (AAB) measure to identify episodes where antibiotics are typically inappropriate.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Acute bronchitis due to Mycoplasma pneumoniae
Acute bronchitis due to Hemophilus influenzae
Acute bronchitis due to parainfluenza virus
Acute bronchitis due to respiratory syncytial virus
Acute bronchitis due to other specified organisms
Acute bronchiolitis due to respiratory syncytial virus
Acute bronchiolitis due to human metapneumovirus
Acute bronchiolitis due to other specified organisms
Bronchitis, not specified as acute or chronic
